title: epipactis helleborine subsp. minor
intro: Epipactis helleborine subsp. minor, also known as the small bell orchid or dwarf helleborine, is a rare and perennial orchid that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that can help to treat various health issues such as wounds, fever, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Epipactis helleborine subsp. minor include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial activity, making it a potential treatment for various health conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of infusions, tinctures, or decoctions, and is sometimes combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
